mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.id as seller_user_id, u.username as seller_username, u.phone as seller_phone, u.avatar as seller_avatar, c.name as category_name, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as first_image_url FROM product p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.seller_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as first_image_url FROM product p WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product
WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, `condition`, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{condition}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, `condition` = #{condition}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
